canonical_name: some servant who might spy on us, or blab to Uriens for a reward
the only mother Uwaine had ever known
the stupid pig farmers of North Wales
a serving-man carrying a tray of early fruits
a young woman for his bed
friends whom they saw only once or twice a year
the finest-looking man she had ever seen
the great ones who has served them for hundreds of years
your foggy kingdom beyond the seas
the chosen champion of a great and beautiful queen
any woman who came into the court
any lady who looked so unhappy
lady, who sits as queen in Wales when Viviane's high seat is empty in Avalon
